title: Monitoring and Logging Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on monitoring and logging in CI/CD.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Monitoring and Logging' in a CI/CD pipeline?
options: To automatically record and analyze your application's status and performance during its building and deployment

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using automated monitoring and logging within your project's CI/CD pipeline?
options: Identifying and fixing errors and status issues quickly before they affect your users
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
